seoTitle: St Ronans vs Stake Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Ronans and Stake Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Ronans vs Stake Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Ronans and Stake Hill.
heading: St Ronans vs Stake Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Ronans, Western Australia and Stake Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stake Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to St Ronans (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Ronans or Stake Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Ronans has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Stake Hill scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Ronans scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Stake Hill scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Ronans or Stake Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stake Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
